The problem
Why fitness apps fail you
📱
They're built for retention, not results
Streaks, badges, social feeds — all designed to keep you opening the app, not to get you leaner.
🔢
Calorie counting is boring by design
You know what's not boring? Watching the number on the scale drop. And seeing definition in the mirror.
🤷
Tools without a system
MyFitnessPal is Excel for food. You still have to know what to do. ShapeDay tells you exactly what to eat, when, and why.
Comparison
Other apps vs ShapeDay

ShapeDay

How it works
Simple by design
1
Tell us about you — once
Height, weight, goal weight. 60 seconds. That's all we need to build your personal deficit system.
2
Log your day in 3 taps
No barcode scanning. No weighing food. Just quick meal entries — breakfast, lunch, dinner. Done.
3
Watch your deficit grow
One number tells you everything. Hit your weekly deficit → lose fat. Miss it → we tell you why and fix it.
4
See your abs
At ~3,500 kcal weekly deficit = ~0.5kg fat gone. Every week. Do the math.
